title: FPS Perfected
description: This is the standard FPS Perfected modpack. Upgrade your game's speed! Has a few tweaks.
body:
# 🔥 FPS Perfected 
_The ultimate FPS modpack for smooth Minecraft Vanilla+ performance._  

## 💪 What is FPS Perfected?  
FPS Perfected is a **highly optimized Minecraft modpack** built for performance on most systems.

## 🔥 Details 
✅ **FPS Boost** – Built for speed 

✅ **Lightweight** – Almost only the essentials, but also a few light tweaks. 

## 🎯 Made For  
🔹 Players running Minecraft on **low-end PCs**  

🔹 **PvP and competitive** players who need smooth frames 

🔹 Anyone who just wants Minecraft to run smooth 

[☕ Support Me!](https://buymeacoffee.com/mushbroom)
